search:azure-devops:azure devops pipelin.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `docker build --tag <image_name>:<tag> .`
  - `docker push <image_name>:<tag>`
  - `docker run -d --name <container_name> <image_name>:<tag>`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Docker@2: Latest version as of April 2026.
  - Azure Pipelines Documentation: Comprehensive guide up to May 2025.

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `Docker@2`: Use this task for building, pushing images, logging in/out, starting/stopping containers, or running Docker commands.
  - `docker build` flags: `--tag`, `.` (context).
  - `docker push` flags: `<image_name>:<tag>`.
  - `docker run` flags: `-d` (detached mode), `--name`, `<image_name>:<tag>`.

- **Additional Resources**:
  - GitHub repository for Azure Pipelines tasks: [microsoft/azure-pipelines-tasks](https://github.com/microsoft/azure-pipelines-tasks)
  - Tutorial for deploying custom tasks to Azure Pipelines.

- **CLI Commands**:
  - `az acr build --image <your-image-name> .`
  - `az containerapp create --name <your-app-name> --resource-group <your-resource-group> --image <your-image-name>`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Azure CLI: Version 2.49.0
  - Azure DevOps: Latest stable version

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `acrName`: Name of your Azure Container Registry.
  - `resourceGroupName`: Resource group where the container app will be deployed.
  - `image`: The name of the Docker image to deploy.
